testimonial.quote: We chose eXist because it allows us to use one technology for all our data needs. The result is a remarkably flexible and maintainable system.
testimonial.author: Joe Wicentowski

testimonial.quote: eXist-db is an amazing piece of technology that fulfills everything a developer could ask for.
testimonial.author: Andreas Jung

testimonial.quote: We have used eXist in a large number of projects, including the award-winning Map of Early Modern London. eXist's native XML storage and XQuery support make it the ideal platform for TEI-based digital editions.
testimonial.author: Martin Holmes
testimonial.org: University of Victoria Humanities Computing and Media Centre

testimonial.quote: eXist-db is the perfect platform for full stack XML web application development with XQuery.
testimonial.author: Stephane Sire

testimonial.quote: TBRC chose eXist-db for its combination of native XML storage, Lucene full-text indexing, and the ability to serve both data and applications. We manage over 10 million scanned pages and 11,000 Unicode Tibetan texts.
testimonial.author: Chris Tomlinson

testimonial.quote: We eliminated 80 percent of our Microsoft codebase when we moved to eXist-db. XQuery 3.0 lets us manipulate our data in ways that would take hundreds of lines of C# code.
testimonial.author: Chris Misztur

testimonial.quote: eXist is a rock-solid database and application development platform. We depend on it for our end-to-end DITA XML content management and publishing system.
testimonial.author: Casey Jordan

testimonial.quote: eXist-db powers the Digital Dictionary of Surnames in Germany, serving 850,000 entries with fast full-text search.
testimonial.author: Franziska Horn
